sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114898" key="xrusokro/talos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρυσο-κρότᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114898.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tinkling with gold,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σπατάλη</foreign> cj. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.270</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maced.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
